---
title: "Neural Network from Scratch"
author: "Erick and Denver"
date: "2026-03-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


Initialization of the nueral network
```{r}
dense <- function(x, weights, bias, af = relu()){
  
  z = weights %>% x + bias
  af(z)
}



```

Activation Functions
```{r}
sigmoid <- function(x){
  1/1+exp(-x)
}

#Beware of Dying relu, non negative inputs please!
relu <- function(x){
  max(0,x)
}

linear <- function(x){
  x
}
```

Loss Functions
```{r}
## Lets implement 3
binary_cross_entropy <- function(){
  
}

sparse_categorical_cross_entropy <- function(){
  
}

mean_square_error <- function(){
  
}
```

Optimizer Functions
```{r}
adam <- function(init_learningrate = .001){
  
}

schocastic_gradient_descent <- function(learningrate = .001){
  
}
```


Forward and Back Propagation
```{r}

```


Training:
```{r}
#Do forward prop,
# Then loss function calculation
# Then back prop
# Then update weights
# do this 50 times(replicate)
init_layers <- function(input_size = 150, layer_size = c(16,8,1)){
  
}

train <- function(modelshape, optimizer, loss, data){
  ## Assemble Data
  train = data[1] %>% select()
}
```

Initilize your model here
```{r}
#add data here
#format:
# c(dataset = iris, target = Sepal.Width, featrues = c(Petal.Length, Species))
dat  = c(dataset = iris, target = Sepal.Width, features = c(Petal.Length, Species))
#add model layers here
model <- function(x, W1, b1){
  a1 = dense(x,  W1, b1, sigmoid)
  a2 = dense(a1, W2, b2, sigmoid)
  a3 = dense(a2, W3, b3, linear)
  a3
}

#add optimizer here
optimizer = adam()
  
#add loss function here
lossfun = binary_cross_entropy()
  
train(model, optimizer, lossfun, dat)
```
